LANDING.TITLE: Panary Edge
LANDING.SUBTITLE: Server Setup
LANDING.WELCOME: Welcome to your new Edge Server. To get started, scan the QR code with your mobile device or continue here.
LANDING.WELCOME_MOBILE: Welcome! You are ready to set up your server.

WELCOME.TITLE: Welcome.
WELCOME.SUBTITLE: Set up your Panary Edge Server in just a few steps.

MODE.TITLE: Select Mode
MODE.STANDALONE_DESC: Local operation. Order System without POS. No internet required.
MODE.CLOUD_DESC: Sync with Organization. Best for chains.

CONFIG.TITLE: Configuration
CONFIG.SHOP_NAME_HINT: Your company name. Used as the organization in the cloud.
CONFIG.LOCATION_NAME_HINT: Address or name of this location. A business can have multiple locations.

WIZARD.RESTARTING_HINT: Waiting for the server to come back online.
